calibration.supersedes: 2.0.0 (madden26.mp4 left-anchored broadcast bar — retired as OCR source, kept as historical fixture)
notes: Madden 26 capture batch uses a COMPACT CENTER-CLUSTERED scorebug, not the v2.0.0 left-anchored full-width broadcast bar. Element drift vs v2.0.0: scoreboard cluster +213..+304px right, down/distance panel -449..-854px left into a centered sub-row. See ADR 0013.

Top row (y~990): home logo | home abbr | home score | center broadcast logo (decorative) | away score | away abbr | away logo. Bottom sub-row (y~1034): down | distance | quarter | clock | play_clock | field_position.
team_home is the LEFT cluster, team_away the RIGHT cluster (same convention as v2.0.0).
distance bbox renders 'KICKOFF' on kickoffs and 'GOAL' on goal-line snaps; OCR pipeline state-classifies. No PUNT panel present in the 1b capture batch.
field_position bbox excludes the leading possession-arrow glyph (which OCR'd as a stray '4'); anchored on the trailing digits.
Element type is smaller than v2.0.0 (e.g. down 95->60px wide); re-crop, do not re-translate.
Scores use a large italic numeral that EasyOCR misreads on some 2-digit values (e.g. 15->'6'); expect scores to be the weakest element, analogous to field_position in v2.0.0/M4.5.

formation_overlay_pre_snap.appears: M5c real classifier reads on-field player layout, not a HUD overlay. Placeholder retained.
